name: knowledge-os
description: OKF-compatible company knowledge base: Markdown as the source of truth + an offline HTML viewer. Hierarchical, scale-ready index with facets and search-by-meaning, plus always-on core context (CONTEXT.md/now.md). /kb-* commands to create, sync, ingest, query, find, onboard projects and deploy, with built-in agent procedures (NEW/JOIN onboarding, dedup-before-add, capture loop). Zones for projects, skills, people, meetings & concepts. Tool-agnostic (Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity).
